message:
fix(web): add iOS Safari clipboard fallback for copy functionality

iOS Safari has quirks with the Clipboard API that cause copy operations to
fail silently in certain contexts (WKWebView, PWA, non-secure origins):

## New clipboard utility (apps/web/src/lib/clipboard.ts)
- Tries modern navigator.clipboard.writeText() first
- Falls back to textarea + document.execCommand('copy') method
- iOS-specific handling:
  - Uses visible but transparent textarea (iOS needs element in viewport)
  - Sets readonly + contentEditable combo to prevent keyboard popup
  - Uses proper selection range for iOS text selection
  - User agent detection for iOS-specific selection handling

## Components updated to use shared utility:
- PromptCard.tsx: Copy button on cards
- PromptDetailModal.tsx: Copy prompt and Install as Skill buttons
- SwipeablePromptCard.tsx: Swipe-to-copy gesture
- BasketSidebar.tsx: Copy install command button

## Also fixes:
- Export getUniqueDelimiter from @jeffreysprompts/core/export
- InstallSkillButton.tsx now uses shared getUniqueDelimiter function

Removes ~60 lines of duplicated clipboard fallback code across components
by consolidating into single reusable utility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
